title: sida surumuensis
intro: Sida surumuensis is a plant species within the Malvaceae family, commonly known as the cottonmallow or sida plant. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Sida surumuensis include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, while also exhibiting antiviral and antifungal activities. In traditional medicine, Sida surumuensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat skin conditions, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems.
